executiveSummary.text: SoFi is a digital financial services company offering student loan refinancing, personal loans, credit cards, and savings accounts through a mobile-first platform. The company is attempting to transition from a fintech lender to a full financial services platform, competing with traditional banks and neobanks for deposit gathering and lending.At $16.62, the stock has de-rated significantly from its SPAC-era highs. The path to profitability is underway but the interest rate environment creates si

businessModel.text: SoFi earns revenue from: (1) net interest income on loans it holds on balance sheet, (2) loan origination fees, (3) membership and subscription fees (SoFi Money, SoFi Invest), and (4) referral fees from third-party financial products. The Galileo banking-as-a-service platform provides B2B revenue from fintech companies using SoFi's infrastructure.

financialSnapshot.text:
Live price: $16.62

52-week range: $9.25 – $17.85
P/E: 43x
Beta: 2.33
Note: Not yet consistently profitable at operating level.

thesisEvaluation.text: Bull (25%): SoFi achieves GAAP profitability and sustains it. Member growth accelerates. Interest rate environment normalises. Price target $22+.Base (55%): Steady member growth. Interest income stabilises. Operating leverage improves margins. Price target $15–18.Bear (20%): Loan demand collapses. Credit quality deteriorates. Funding costs remain elevated. Price target $8–11.Weighted conviction: 42/100. REDUCE.

bull.scenario: Bull (25%): SoFi achieves GAAP profitability and sustains it. Member growth accelerates. Interest rate environment normalises. Price target $22+.

base.scenario: Base (55%): Steady member growth. Interest income stabilises. Operating leverage improves margins. Price target $15–18.

bear.scenario: Bear (20%): Loan demand collapses. Credit quality deteriorates. Funding costs remain elevated. Price target $8–11.

risks.risk: Interest rate sensitivity (HIGH): Rising rates simultaneously increase funding costs and reduce loan demand — the worst possible combination for a fintech lender.
Credit quality (MEDIUM): Consumer credit deterioration in a slowdown would hit SoFi's loan portfolio harder than most lenders given the prime borrower focus.

recommendation.text: REDUCE — SPECULATIVE at $16.62. Fintech lending in a high-rate environment is structurally challenged.

entryExit.text:
